div1.entryFree:
Recourse, 1) repeated course, frequent flowing: their eyes o'ergalled with r. of tears, Troil. V, 3, 55.
2) access, admission: no man hath r. to her by night, Gent. III, 1, 112. to give me r. to him, Wiv. II, 1, 223. that no manner of person at any time have r. unto the princes, R3 III, 5, 109.
